title: Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: An independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT) compiled entirely by Gemini 3.1.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 6.0% - Reflecting long-term structural tailwinds in semiconductor capital equipment, balanced against cyclicality and export control impacts.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% - Standard mature growth rate slightly above GDP, reflecting the mission-critical nature of semiconductor manufacturing.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.5% - Based on a Beta of 1.63 and reflecting the inherent cyclical risk in the semiconductor equipment sector.
